Centralized Phone Authentication (Passkey)

Register your phone as a hardware security key to authorize sensitive agent actions and secure your vault.

android
Android Profile Data Sharing
Sync your Android identity, device status, and locale preferences with Agent Zero.
User:
Email:
Timezone:
Synced:
apple
Apple (iOS) Profile Sync
Sync your Apple identity and environment preferences with Agent Zero.
User:
Email:
Timezone:
Synced:
Native Push Notifications
Get proactive alerts on your phone even when Agent Zero is closed.
Authorization Rules
Mandatory Tool Authorization
Require a phone tap for all sensitive tool executions (Email, Terminal, Files).
Vault Unlocking
Decrypt 'usr/secrets.json' only after a successful Passkey authentication.
